message:
Expand test coverage: fcp-telemetry (+80), fcp-oauth (+44), fix fcp-crypto clippy

fcp-telemetry/trace_capture.rs: 21→70 tests covering redaction policies,
trace event variants, captured trace lifecycle, file I/O, CBOR roundtrips.

fcp-telemetry/usage.rs: 35→66 tests covering concurrent recording, zone/
connector/capability aggregation, quota enforcement, serde roundtrips.

fcp-oauth/oauth2.rs: 20→64 tests covering authorization URL generation,
callback parsing, auth styles, mock server integration flows, PKCE,
extra params, and token response handling.

fcp-crypto/ed25519.rs: Add missing `# Errors` doc section to fix clippy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
